SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 303 - JUDGE: DOUGLAS C. MUNSON, CLERK: DAVID SWANSON, REPORTER: MARY HINDS, #2011. TOM F. HUSTER APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT APPEARED IN PRO PER. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, SETTLED ON RECORD: PLAINTIFF WAIVES RENTS, $348 SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE RETURNED TO DEFENDANT. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS. DEFENDANT WILL VACATE 1272 VAN NESS ON OR BEFORE 4/30/02. DEFENDANT ALSO WAIVES ALL CLAIMS & 1542 CIVIL CODE CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF WILL NOT GIVE ADVERSE REFERENCE. NO FURTHER STAYS & NO APPEAL MADE BY DEFT. TRIAL DATE OF MAR-18-2002 TAKEN OFF CALENDAR.
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-18-2002 - SETTLED AT SETT CONF.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Settlement conference assigned to Dept. 303 - Judge: Douglas C. Munson, Clerk: David Swanson, Reporter: Mary Hinds, #2011. Tom F. Huster appeared for plaintiff, defendant appeared in pro per. Settlement conference held, settled on record: Plaintiff waives rents, $348 security deposit to be returned to defendant. Each party to bear own costs. Defendant will vacate 1272 Van Ness on or before 4/30/02. Defendant also waives all claims & 1542 Civil Code claims. Plaintiff will not give adverse reference. No further stays & no appeal made by deft.
Trial date of Mar-18-2002 taken off calendar.
